---
description: "Use when finishing a task described in the specs or in the plan. Compare the implementation with the legacy code to ensure that all features are covered and that the new code is correct and complete."
applyTo: "**/*.ts"
---
# Spec Comparison
- Review the specs and the implementation
- Compare with legacy java code in mauve folder
- Compare with legacy ts code in mauve-viewer-legacy folder
- Ensure all features described in the task are covered
